Here's what we're going to do now. For part two, we're going to do what's called a timeline regression. Now, it's not hypnosis in any way, so don't worry. You're not going to be hypnotized. You're going to be in a heightened state of awareness. You'll be in complete control of all your thoughts. The only thing you're giving power to here is your own subconscious mind, which is infinitely more powerful than your conscious mind, and it will always protect you. I'll guide you through this process, but remember that it's you who are in control every single moment. Now, here's what we're going to do. We're going to create your timeline again, that line that goes forward and back through time, and we're going to actually cruise backwards, float back in time until you find that root experience, that first experience you had that created the limiting money belief that you have. Whatever that first experience was, maybe you heard your parents say something, maybe you had a bad experience with your first big sale, whatever it might be that caused you to create this negative belief that's personal to you, and then we're going to have you re-experience that belief, except you're going to experience it now in the present with the resources of the adult that you are now. Remember, you have access to all the resources that you need. In other words, the unconditional love, certainty, courage, compassion, power, faith, confidence, determination, and the clarity of all these resources that are available to you now, you can take these back in time with you when you re-experience this limiting belief. You're going to take these new resources with you in this little bubble. We're going to imagine our little helicopter bubble. It's a bit corny, I know, but it works. You're going to float back in time. You're going to create what's called the safety sandwich, meaning I'm going to have you go to a spot literally just five minutes before the limiting belief was created, the negative experience, and then five minutes afterwards. And then we're going to float forward, and you're going to re-experience the actual memory, but this time you'll experience it with those new resources available to you. Now we're not wiping out your memory by any means. What we are going to do is have you change the language so you can apply a new meaning to that root experience. And after we've gone through that belief two or three times, changing the language, we're then going to actually float up towards the present, and I'll be talking to you as we're doing this. See, what happens is that your brain, your unconscious mind automatically rearranges the meanings from all the other experiences after that root experience. Now the great thing is you don't have to go through every single experience and change each individual meaning. It's just that first root experience, the initial trigger that created the root of the limiting belief. Then when you reach the present, I'm going to actually have you go forward into the future and have you see yourself acting on the new belief, the more empowering belief. You'll see yourself doing stuff without the limiting belief, and you'll see yourself feeling great with this new belief. And what this is called is future pacing of belief, meaning we float into the future and you see yourself acting on this new empowering belief. And you'll actually see yourself doing stuff without this limiting belief and feeling great. So let's begin now. Now I want you to sit in a comfortable position, feet flat on the floor, hands in your lap, and take a deep breath in and let it out slowly. Now do it again, and let your eyes gently close. Now you're going to take a little trip here, your unconscious mind may or may not be involved. Let everything go and know that your unconscious mind will keep you safe and only wants the best for you, so you can totally, totally relax. Now as you're sitting in your chair, noticing how your feet feel as they touch the floor, your hands feel as they gently rest on your lap, your back resting against the chair, the feel of the air on your skin, and the sound of my voice all helping you be very, very comfortable. Take any small adjustments that you may need in order to be as comfortable as possible and to relax more deeply now. And as you sit in the chair, get a sense of where you are in this moment, sitting here in this room with your eyes closed right now. In a moment, I'm going to ask you to point to a place where you would feel that the present moment is for you. If you had to say where you see the present moment right now, where would it be? Some people, it's in front of them. For others, it's inside them, or beside them, or even behind them. Once you have a sense of where the present moment is for you, point to it now. That's right. Now think of a moment from today. Maybe you're getting ready to come to work. Maybe you're waking up and brushing your teeth or getting dressed or driving to work. Remember one moment from earlier today. If you had to point to where that moment was, where it occurred, where would it be? Get a sense of exactly where that moment shows up for you. Is it behind you? Is it beside you, to your left, to your right? Is it lower or higher? Point to exactly where that memory of this morning is for you. And again, there's no right or wrong answer to whatever you feel that moment is for you. Now I want you to remember something pleasant happened maybe a year ago. Perhaps a birthday or a trip that you had with your family or someone that you loved and cared about, or a moment of great success or happiness. I want you to see and feel that memory as clearly as you possibly can. Where were you? What were you doing? Who else was there with you? What did you see? Notice if your eyes are looking in a particular direction as you remember that moment. Where does that memory show up for you? When I say so, point to the place where that memory appears for you. On the count of three, one, two, three, point to that memory of a year ago. Now see your timing of the past extending from where you are now through the point you saw this morning, through the point you saw the memory of a year ago. Now put your hand down and come back to the present moment. Feel yourself back in the chair sitting comfortably. And as you sit there, imagine yourself a year from now in the future. Where will you be? What will you be doing? What will you be seeing, hearing, feeling? Notice how your eyes move to a particular spot as you visualize your future a year from now. When I say so, point to the place where that vision of the future is for you. One, two, three, point to the future. That's right. Now see your future timeline extending from your present, from where you are right now, through your vision of a year from now into your future. With your eyes closed now, use your finger to trace the line from the present moment to a year from now, then off into your distant future. That's right. Now use your finger to trace your entire timeline from the present back to the past, then back to the present, and then off into the future. Now back to the present, then back into your past, to the present, and then to the future. That's right. That's your timeline. Now I want you to imagine that you're floating up above your body, about six, eight feet above your body. Now you're inside one of those glass helicopter bubbles. And notice that inside the bubble, there are a couple of buttons. These are your controls. One of them is a stick, like a joystick for moving this way or that way, like in a video game. You can go left, right, forward, back. And the more force that you put on the joystick, the faster you'd move. I want you to just take this hand. I'll have a little fun with it for a second, and just cruise around the room that you're in right now using this joystick. And just know that you can take this thing wherever you want. You're the best pilot in the world. Just cruise around for a minute or so, 30 seconds is enough. Just cruise around your little helicopter bubble, this glass bubble, and just cruise outside now around that city or town that you're in. You can go outdoors for a bit. Just have a bit of fun here. You can just jet right out, and you can go as fast as you possibly want, and cruise all the way around. And now what I want you to do is this. In your helicopter bubble, you're safe. You're completely safe in this bubble. I want you to turn around so you're facing your past. And now slowly, I want you to push forward on your joystick and start heading back into the past. And may you move up a bit now, perhaps 12 to 15 feet above your timeline so you're looking downward at your past. Now notice how you see all the events of your life as points along that timeline. Moments and events that shape you both for good and for ill, haven't they? And remember that you were above your timeline experiencing these moments from a distance. You're not actually in them, so you're not really feeling them viscerally. You can see things almost objectively. And as you're floating above your past timeline, I want you to remember that old, negative, limiting belief that you wrote down. The belief that you said you want to get rid of, the one that had an experience attached to it. Something that happened that caused you to adopt that belief as being true. Float along the timeline into the past and see the events of your life passing underneath you until you come upon the earliest moment that you can remember when you first had that limiting belief. And I want you to float back to that earliest memory you have, an early experience that might have formed the actual root of this limiting belief. This is called your root experience. And when you get there to this root experience, I want you to hover over it. It might be a dark spot, not overly dark, but it might very well be a dark spot. I want you to float over that limiting belief and just hover right there. And as you look down at that belief, that experience, notice that inside the helicopter you have some other buttons as well. One button is for certainty. Another is for knowledge. Another is for unconditional love. And at any moment that you want, right now, you can push any one of these buttons and give yourself that resource. It will just simply wash over you and you will be a watch in that resource. Sometimes we float backwards and we think that we found the root experience, but in fact we haven't because when we get there and look at it, it wakes something else up inside us. And then we realize that there's actually something that happened even before this. So take another deep breath right now and I want you to float backwards again and see if you can find an even earlier experience. If you can't, then just float back to this one. But if you could float back further, when I count to ten, if you're not sure where you're going, your unconscious mind will automatically put you exactly where you need to be. Remember your unconscious mind is much more powerful. So even if you can't remember yourself consciously, your unconscious mind remembers exactly where this root experience is. So when I count to ten, you're going to stop right there hovering right above that first root experience that caused you to have this limiting belief. One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine, ten. You're there. Your unconscious mind always knows. Now what we're going to do is we're going to actually form what's called a safety sandwich. So we're going to go back two or three minutes, maybe even five minutes before this experience and when you get there, I want you to stop and put a little marker there. And make it a white marker so you know that it's before this belief ever happened. And notice that any feelings that you may have had are gone now because this experience hasn't even happened yet. And the reason you'll put a little marker there is so we can get back there if you ever need to. Now I want you to float up a little bit higher, maybe 12 feet above the line and cruise forward slowly, looking at this experience, not drawing any means to it right now, but I want you to float forward until about three minutes after this experience. Now it could be even further, maybe even a week after this experience, whatever time it takes you when you no longer feel the effects of that experience that first caused this limiting belief. So yes, you have the belief now because you've experienced it, but you're not feeling uncomfortable. You feel safe again. It was a negative experience. It's over. If you need to go, you know, again, five minutes later, 15 minutes later, or a week later, that's fine too. But I want you to have a safe place to go on both sides of the experience before and after. And when you get to that spot after the experience and you're comfortable, put down a white marker there too, a little white line, thick white line. And notice you have these two lines now and turn around so you're now facing the past. I want you to float up to your first white line before the experience happened now. I want you to turn around forward in your helicopter bubble so you're now facing towards the present. And I want you to understand that right now, while we don't have the power to change our memories, we certainly have the power to change the meanings that we draw from them. And before we move forward and relive this experience, I want you to push any of the buttons that you think you need. Confidence, clarity, compassion, courage, faith, love. It doesn't matter what it is, compassion, anything you need, whatever resource you need, push the button and notice how you become awash in this resource. It just seems to flow all over you, every pore of your body. Now notice inside this bubble is a button very far on the right. I want you to press that button now and notice that the bottom door hatch, a little hatch opens up and you could actually exit the helicopter and float down to your timeline. Press that button now. I want you to descend outside the helicopter and float down with all the resources that you need. Go right down to that little white line where you're safe. You're floating in the air just a foot or two above the line right there in the scene and I want you to relive this experience again. See what people were doing. Hear what they were saying, except this time, rather than drawing the wrong conclusion that caused you to have that limiting belief, I want you to draw a new meaning, an empowering meaning. And as you cruise forward, you could even laugh a bit, just chuckle to yourself and you'll notice how with the resources of an adult with clarity, confidence, courage, unconditional love, as you relive this experience and float forward, you begin to draw a new, empowering meaning and now relive this experience. As you see the people doing what they were doing, you're listening, maybe you were acting in this scene, notice how the meaning begins to change in light of the new learnings. And slowly float forward now. Over a period of 15 seconds, I want you to relive this experience so you're right back at the front end of your safety sandwich. And as you float forward, notice how your perspective has changed. There's a new meaning being applied in light of the new learnings and in 10 seconds, you'll reach the front end and notice how the meaning has changed as you came from a perspective of truth. Now that you have the truth on your side and you have the resources from the perspective of truth, it's an entirely different meaning that you draw from this experience. Now you're at the front end. Jump off the line and turn backwards and flip around. Zip right back to the first part of the safety sandwich, flip around, right there in the beginning end and turn forward facing the present. I want us to go through this experience again now and notice how the meaning has changed from the perspective of absolute truth that you now have in light of your new learnings. And run through this experience again. Go through it right now, except this time do it in eight seconds. When I get to eight, you'll be at the front end of your safety sandwich. One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight. You're safe again in the front. Now I want you to float up again, face backwards and go back to the beginning of the safety sandwich. And I want you to do this again in five seconds now this time. I want you to notice how different you feel though as you go forward in five seconds and you relieve this again, how liberated you feel and how much lighter you feel, how this belief that you once had from this rude experience no longer even has power over you. And float forward one, two, three, four, five. Now float back up and go back to the beginning of your safety sandwich, the absolute beginning. Relax and take a deep breath. And notice now as we float forward again one more time, slowing this time, see your younger, more confident self now with a new meaning, except this time if there's anybody else in the scene that could use the same resources that you have right now, I want you to lend them those resources. And notice how the people begin to act differently now that they have the perspective of truth. As you run through this scene again, notice how not only your meaning has changed, but the players themselves are drawing the new meanings from this experience. Do this in ten seconds, float forward one, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine, ten. Now float back up, go back to the beginning of your safety sandwich and turn forward now and the quicker you float forward, notice how the memories have now changed. The meanings have changed in light of the new learnings and you get just to the present I want you to stop. And now floating, turn around and face your past and any of those dark points in this limiting belief are now light. Those new meanings have been applied. Notice how you don't need any resources now because you're feeling great and you're no longer in the bubble. You're just floating freely and it feels perfectly okay. And now turn around so you're facing the future and I want you to float forward about two weeks into the future and see yourself acting with this new belief. In other words, you don't have that limiting belief anymore. You have the opposite belief. And notice how you see yourself active and feeling better in light of the new learning and not having this limiting belief anymore and how much more fluid you feel and how you're attracting massive success in sales into your life. See what you'll be seeing, feel what you'll be feeling and now float even further forward to a year from now and notice how you've started to accumulate money from all this massive success in sales and see yourself acting and being wealthy and feeling wealthy and not being bogged down by that limiting belief anymore. Now float forward a couple of years, maybe five years into the future and again now see how this mass success in sales has changed your life. You're massively wealthy. You've closed the major sale. You've opened a new account. See yourself and how you'd act no longer having that limiting belief and notice how it feels good. Give yourself this gift for a few seconds and now float up a bit more and turn around so you're now facing the past future, the future past and notice how everything that's happened in the last five years is exactly as it should be. The obstacles, the barriers, they were still there but the limiting belief was not so you were able to overcome all those barriers and obstacles and now slowly start floating back towards the present and you see yourself looking down. You see yourself sitting in the chair and slowly float back into the room inside your body and stay there for a second. Take a couple of deep breaths and when you feel comfortable, slowly open your eyes and just notice how great you feel, how empowered you feel in light of the new learnings and the limiting belief is now gone. Replace with the empowering belief.
